title: Core Optimized
description: Core Optimized is modpack designed to focus on Vanilla world exploration with Performance improvement modes and  few QoL mods. It does not contain any big game-changing modes.
body:
[![Partner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1ed68340363cdaae11ce5f17d16d9d7c11bbe197.png)](https://wabbanode.com/affiliate/coreoptimizedbysniperxjohn)

CoreOptimized is a carefully curated Minecraft modpack designed to enhance the classic Vanilla gameplay experience without straying far from its core essence. It focuses on improving **world exploration**, **performance**, and **quality of life** through lightweight, non-intrusive mods.

This modpack provides a perfect balance between keeping the beloved Vanilla feel and integrating subtle improvements that elevate gameplay. From smoother terrain generation and optimized rendering to immersive soundscapes and intuitive UI tweaks, every addition is thoughtfully selected to refine the experience.

Whether you're adventuring through vast biomes, building intricate creations, or simply enjoying the serene beauty of the Minecraft world, Vanilla Improved ensures it all runs seamlessly and looks better than ever. With no major game-changing mods, this pack is ideal for those who want an improved Vanilla experience without altering its fundamental charm.

Perfect for explorers, builders, and Vanilla purists who want to keep it simple, yet extraordinary!

**Credits:**
All credit goes to the amazing mod developers who created these incredible mods. I simply combined them into this bundle to make it easier for players to enjoy a refined Vanilla Minecraft experience.

**FAQ**

---

**Q: What is CoreOptimized?**  
A: CoreOptimized is a modpack designed to enhance Minecraft's performance and improve the gaming experience with various QoL changes, while maintaining the vanilla feel of the game.

---

**Q: How can I install CoreOptimized?**  
A: CoreOptimized is available on the Modrinth platform and can be installed using the following launchers:  
- **[ATLauncher](https://atlauncher.com)**  
- **[Prism Launcher](https://prismlauncher.org)**  
- **[Modrinth Launcher](https://modrinth.com)**  

For detailed documentation [click here](https://coreoptimized.readthedocs.io/en/latest/installation).

---

**Q: What does the modpack include?**  
A: The modpack includes:  
- **Resource Packs**: Enhance the visual quality of the game.  
- **Shaderpacks**: Improve graphics and lighting effects.  
- **Performance Mods**: Optimize the game for smoother performance.  
- **QoL Mods**: Add minor improvements to gameplay for a better experience.  

These additions ensure a high-performance experience without losing the vanilla feel of Minecraft.

---

**Q: Where can I find more information or support?**  
A: You can find more information and support at the following:  
- **Documentation**: Visit the [CoreOptimized Wiki](https://coreoptimized.readthedocs.io).  
- **Community Support**: Join the [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/qWc7c6tZPP) to connect with the community and get assistance.

---

**Q: What is the license for CoreOptimized?**  
A: CoreOptimized is licensed under the **[MIT License](https://github.com/asabhi6776/CoreOptimized/blob/master/LICENSE)**, providing freedom for the community to use, modify, and distribute the modpack.

---
